action.reasoning: Observation: Best test accuracy is 89.69% (iter 26) with best_iter23.pt. The weight optimization from iter 25 found degenerate weights (mc=1.0) because it was run on the train+val model which overfit. The NCM scale factor (15.0) was never optimized. Analysis: Re-optimizing weights/temperatures/NCM scale specifically for best_iter23.pt on the val set should find better parameters since the val data is 'unseen' for this train-only model. The SWA checkpoint is from a mismatched model (train+val), so the optimization will automatically downweight it if it hurts. Decision: (1) Write optimize_v2.py to search over weights, temperatures, and NCM scale for best_iter23.pt, (2) Update predict.py to read ncm_scale from optimal_weights.json, (3) Run optimization, (4) Submit eval.
